title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Chief Project Manager & Project Manager
shortInfo: Delhi State Industrial and Infrastructure Development Corporation (DSIIDC) has released a recruitment notification for 8 posts including Chief Project Manager & Project Manager for Degree/ Diploma in Civil Engineering, MBA, Construction Management and Environmental Science candidates, and candidates can apply offline till 31-05-2026 at dsiidc.org.

basic_details.job_title: DSIIDC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Chief Project Manager & Project Manager Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Delhi State Industrial and Infrastructure Development Corporation
basic_details.short_information: Delhi State Industrial and Infrastructure Development Corporation (DSIIDC) has released a recruitment notification for 8 posts including Chief Project Manager & Project Manager for Degree/ Diploma in Civil Engineering, MBA, Construction Management and Environmental Science candidates, and candidates can apply offline till 31-05-2026 at dsiidc.org.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 50 years Age relaxation will be as per the rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks, Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks, Post Graduation in Construction Management, MBA or equivalent degree, Post Graduation in Environmental Science
qualification.details: Chief Project Manager (High Rise Building (DTC/DPCC Projects)): Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Post Graduation in Construction Management. Chief Project Manager (PPP Projects): Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: MBA or equivalent degree in concerned field. Chief Project Manager (Environment): Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Post Graduation in Environmental Science. Chief Project Manager (Road Works): Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Post Graduation in Construction Management. Project Manager (Building (DTC/DPCC Projects)): Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Post Graduation in Construction Management. Project Manager (Environment): Diploma/Degree in Civil Engineering with minimum 50% marks from a recognized University/Institution. Desirable: Post Graduation in Environmental Science.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.dsiidc.org.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 31-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for DSIIDC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the DSIIDC Chief Project Manager & Project Manager posts is 31st May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address by this date.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualifications vary by post, but generally include a Degree in Civil Engineering with at least 50% marks. Some posts also require a Diploma in Civil Engineering, Post Graduation in Construction Management, MBA, or Post Graduation in Environmental Science.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the DSIIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit for all posts is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 50 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Chief Project Manager and Project Manager roles?
faq.answer: The salary for Chief Project Manager posts is Rs. 1,40,000/- per month, and for Project Manager posts, it is Rs. 95,000/- per month.

faq.question: How can I apply for the DSIIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the official notification via Speed Post or Registered Post.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for DSIIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in this DSIIDC recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 8 vacancies for the posts of Chief Project Manager and Project Manager in this DSIIDC recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves the scrutiny of applications followed by an interview or personal interaction with the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: What is the job type for these DSIIDC positions?
faq.answer: The positions of Chief Project Manager and Project Manager are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of DSIIDC, www.dsiidc.org. Direct links are also provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.
